tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated LDL cholesterol (108.2 mg/dL; upper limit 100 mg/dL). Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile (except LDL) are unremarkable. Recommend lifestyle modification and possible follow-up for LDL management to reduce cardiovascular risk. No acute laboratory concerns.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
